title: Alternate Universe Reskins (JCraft: EOE)
description: Reskins all of the default stand skins for a bit of a change. Good for the new Steel Block Run server. (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Reskins all of the default stand skins for a bit of a change

This was made with the new Steel Block Run server (and modpack) in mind. Join the JCraft Discord Server then the SBR discord server through it.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/steel-block-run

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stands

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
